1.text: The human maceman corpse punches the stray yak bull in the right front leg with her left hand, bruising the muscle!

10.text: The human maceman corpse kicks the stray yak bull in the lower body with her right foot, bruising the muscle and bruising the pancreas!

11.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the upper body with her ({silver mace}), bruising the muscle and bruising the right lung!

12.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the upper body with her ({silver mace}), bruising the muscle and bruising the liver!

13.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the left rear leg with her ({silver mace}), fracturing the bone!

14.text: The stray yak bull has become enraged!

15.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the left rear leg with her ({silver mace}) and the injured part explodes into gore!

16.text: The human maceman corpse punches the stray yak bull in the lower body with her right hand, bruising the muscle and bruising the guts!

17.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the lower body with her ({silver mace}), bruising the muscle and bruising the spleen!

18.text: Dastot Manorhands has assumed the position of expedition leader of The Corridor of Heaven.

19.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the head with her ({silver mace}), bruising the muscle and chipping the skull!

2.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the right front leg with her ({silver mace}), but the attack glances away!

20.text: The force twists the neck, tearing apart the skin and bruising the muscle!

3.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the right front hoof with her ({silver mace}) and the injured part is crushed!

4.text: The human maceman corpse kicks the stray yak bull in the left rear leg with her right foot, bruising the muscle!

5.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the left front hoof with her ({silver mace}), fracturing it!

6.text: The force bends the left front leg!

7.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the left horn with her ({silver mace}), chipping the bone!

8.text: The force twists the head, tearing apart the skin!

9.text: The human maceman corpse bashes the stray yak bull in the left front hoof with her ({silver mace}) and the injured part is crushed!

1.text: A diplomat could not complete a meeting and has left unhappy.

[C:7:0:1]A Dwarven Outpost:[C:7:0:0]  You have arrived.  After a journey from the Mountainhomes into the forbidding wilderness beyond, your harsh trek has finally ended.  Your party of seven is to make an outpost for the glory of all of Urist Ă˘bir.  [B]There are almost no supplies left, but with stout labor comes sustenance.  Whether by bolt, plow or hook, provide for your dwarves.  You are expecting a supply caravan just before winter entombs you, but it is Spring now.  Enough time to delve secure lodgings, ere the wolves get hungry. [B]A new chapter of dwarven history begins here at this place, Thobteshkad, "Girderpriced".  [C:2:0:1]Strike the earth![C:7:0:0]

Although it is a grim reminder of the winter hardships to come, the supply caravan from The Dagger of Romancing is a welcome sight. Their eyes are alight with the anticipation of inspecting the splendid products of your industrious craftsdwarves. [B]Take careful stock of your own stores. What these merchants offer might very well be the difference between a prosperous future and a slow and meaningless death.

Your fortress is out of food!  Consider placing a farmplot on some underground soil and planting seeds.  Try building a butcher's shop and slaughtering some livestock.  Perhaps you can gather plants, fruit, or go fishing.

2.text: Your fortress is out of food!  Consider placing a farmplot on some underground soil and planting seeds.  Try building a butcher's shop and slaughtering some livestock.  Perhaps you can gather plants, fruit, or go fishing.

3.text: Your fortress is out of food!  Are your farmplots working?  Make sure you are planting edible plants.  Try building a butcher's shop and slaughtering some livestock.  Perhaps you can gather plants, fruit, or go fishing.
